records.change_text:
Contents, P-31.2. [corrected 31 December 2025]
For P-31.2 SUBSTITUENT GROUPS MODIFIED BY THE PREFIXES ‘HYDRO’ AND ‘DEHYDRO’
read P-31.2 PARENT HYDRIDES MODIFIED BY THE PREFIXES ‘HYDRO’ AND ‘DEHYDRO’

Contents, P-32.2. [corrected 31 December 2025]
For P-32.2 SUBSTITUENT GROUPS DERIVED FROM PARENT HYDRIDES MODIFIED BY THE PREFIX ‘HYDRO’
read P-32.2 SUBSTITUENT GROUPS DERIVED FROM PARENT HYDRIDES MODIFIED BY THE PREFIX ‘HYDRO’ AND ‘DEHYDRO’

P-13.2.2.1, example 2. [corrected 9 October 2024]
For C6H5 -P(O)(OH)2
read C6H5-P(O)(OH)2
for C6H5 -P(≡N)-OH
read C6H5-P(≡N)-OH

P-13.3.5, example. [corrected 8 October 2025]
For carbon monoxide—methylborane (PIN)
read carbon monoxide—methylborane (1/1) (PIN)

For dimethyl butanedioylbis(oxy-2,1-phenylene) dibutanedioate (PIN)
read dimethyl butanedioylbis[oxy(2,1-phenylene)] dibutanedioate (PIN)

P-14.3.4.2 (d), text. [corrected 9 April 2025]
For(d) in unsubstituted dinuclear and trinuclear...
read (d) in any dinuclear, unsubstituted trinuclear...

P-14.3.4.4, after examples add. [corrected 9 April 2025]
For As an exception the locant is not omitted from propan-2-one, butan-2-one, prop-2-enoic acid and prop-2-ynoic acid although unambiguous without a locant.
read As an exception the locant is not omitted from propa-1,2-diene, propan-2-one, butan-2-one, prop-2-enoic acid and prop-2-ynoic acid although unambiguous without a locant.

unless: [corrected 9 April 2025] For As an exception the locant is not omitted from propan-2-one, butan-2-one, prop-2-enoic acid and prop-2-ynoic acid although unambiguous without a locant. read As an exception the locant is not omitted from propa-1,2-diene, propan-2-one, butan-2-one, prop-2-enoic acid and prop-2-ynoic acid although unambiguous without a locant.

records.target: P-28.3.1, add two new examples after example 5
records.change_text:
P-28.3.1, add two new examples after example 5. [Corrected 8 October 2025]
Add
not
12,25:22,34-terpyridine (PIN)
(not 12,23:26,34-terpyridine);
the locant set 12,22,25,34 is lower than the locant set 12,23,26,34)
2,5′:2′,4′′-terpyridine
(not 2,3′:6′,4′′-terpyridine
the locant set 2,2′,5′,4′′ is lower than the locant set 2,6′,3′,4′′)
not
13,23:25,34-terpyridine (PIN)
(not 13,25:23,34-terpyridine);
both locant sets are the same but 13,23:25,34 is lower than 13,25:23,34 in the order of citation.
3,3′:5′,4′′-terpyridine
(not 3,5′:3′,4′′-terpyridine
both locant sets are the same but 3,3′:5′,4′′ is lower than 3,5′:3′,4′′ in the order of citation.
Page 345, P-28.4.1, example 2
. [Corrected 8 October 2025]
Replace structure by
for 13,213,33-trioxa-11,21:27:31-tercyclotetradecane (PIN)
read 13,29,33-trioxa-11,21:27:31-tercyclotetradecane (PIN)
(not 13,213,33-trioxa-11,21:27:31-tercyclotetradecane; 13,29,33 is lower than 13,213,33)
for 3′,3′′,13′-trioxa-1,1′:7′,1′′-tercyclotetradecane
read 3,3′′,9′-trioxa-1,1′:7′,1′′-tercyclotetradecane
(not 3,3′′,13′-trioxa-1,1′:7′,1′′-tercyclotetradecane; 3,3′′,9′ is lower than 3,3′′,13′)

For ...the longest chain, the maximum number of substituents...
read ...the longest chain, the lowest attachment locants in the order of citation, the maximum number of substituents...

P-31, line 3. [corrected 31 December 2025]
For P-31.2 The prefixes ‘hydro’ and ‘dehydro’
read P-31.2 The parent hydrides modified by the prefixes ‘hydro’ and ‘dehydro’

P-31.1.1.1, after text. [corrected 4 September 2024]
Add If the stereochemistry of a double bond is indicated in a structure it should be specified by E or Z with the appropriate locant. This includes double bonds in rings of eight or more members (see P-91.2.2).

if: [corrected 4 September 2024] Add If the stereochemistry of a double bond is indicated in a structure it should be specified by E or Z with the appropriate locant.

Add If both hydro and dehydro prefixes are used in name, dehydro prefixes are cited before hydro prefixes with the order not affected by multipliers.

read ...present, all descriptors of double bonds in rings of more than seven nodes are cited (see P-91.2.2)

then: [corrected 4 September 2024] For ...present, all descriptors are must be cited (see P-91.2.2). read ...present, all descriptors of double bonds in rings of more than seven nodes are cited (see P-91.2.2)
